meta.description: Ailan Alberto Ñañez — Full-Stack Developer. Laravel, Vue.js, React, Node.js.

hero.eyebrow: Available for projects and remote teams
hero.name: Ailan Alberto Ñañez
hero.lead: Eight years building scalable web applications, APIs, and systems with a strong focus on quality and documentation.

profile.title: Professional profile
profile.intro: Full-Stack Developer with 8 years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications. Specialized in the Laravel/PHP ecosystem for backend and Vue.js/React for frontend, with solid experience in robust architectures, RESTful APIs, database optimization, and technical team leadership.
profile.commitment: Committed to code quality through SOLID principles, Clean Code, and rigorous technical documentation. Proven experience in critical infrastructure, e-commerce, and enterprise management projects, working with agile methodologies in remote and hybrid environments.

freelance.bullet1: Full-stack web development with Laravel, Vue.js (Quasar, Vuetify), and React.
freelance.bullet2: Scalable architectures for management, e-commerce, and educational applications.
freelance.bullet3: Performance and UX optimization in medium- and high-complexity projects.
freelance.bullet4: Full lifecycle: requirements, development, deployment, and post-delivery support.
freelance.bullet5: Integration of APIs, payment gateways, and third-party services.

prolesys.bullet1: Critical systems for national infrastructure: security and high availability.
prolesys.bullet2: Technical leadership on robust architectures and development standards.
prolesys.bullet3: Optimization in high-traffic applications: response times and stability.
prolesys.bullet4: Team management and mentoring: Clean Code, SOLID, code review, and documentation.
prolesys.bullet5: Design and consumption of REST APIs for integration with external systems.

sismg.bullet1: Software modules for the Chilean market, coordination with remote teams.
sismg.bullet2: Frontend with Vue.js and React, cross-browser compatibility and performance.
sismg.bullet3: Integration with PHP/Laravel and Node.js backends via REST.
sismg.bullet4: Scrum/Kanban and continuous delivery in sprints.

goldtech.bullet1: Data management modules for enterprise systems.
goldtech.bullet2: Performance improvements: ~40% faster load times (SQL + cache).
goldtech.bullet3: REST APIs for integration with external systems.
goldtech.bullet4: Legacy module refactoring: maintainability and scalability.

homines.bullet1: Data management modules for internal corporate systems.
homines.bullet3: Responsive interfaces with Vue.js, HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript.
homines.bullet4: Migration from legacy to modern technologies, reducing technical debt.

projectWorkflow.title: Workflow
projectWorkflow.primary: GitHub Projects and Issues as the workflow backbone, with living documentation and sprint visibility in GitHub through pull requests and continuous tracking.
projectWorkflow.secondary: Clear delivery environments (dev, QA, staging, prod) and, when needed, support from Scrum, Jira, and Confluence.

footer.title: Ready to discuss your project?
footer.subtitle: Available to collaborate on web products, continuous improvements, and development support.
